# revenuecat Provider

Manage RevenueCat project configuration through the RevenueCat REST API v2.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    revenuecat = {
      source  = "cloudridgeworks/revenuecat"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

# Set REVENUECAT_API_KEY to a RevenueCat v2 secret key with the project
# configuration permissions needed by the resources in this configuration.
provider "revenuecat" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) RevenueCat v2 secret API key. May also be set with `REVENUECAT_API_KEY`.
- `base_url` (String) RevenueCat REST API v2 base URL. May also be set with `REVENUECAT_BASE_URL`; intended for testing.
